/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/ShaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Sprite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/TileMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/soil.c.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/image_dxt.c.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/image_helper.c.o CMakeFiles/BugsBunnyCrazyCastle.dir/external/soil/src/stb_image_aug.c.o -o BugsBunnyCrazyCastle  /usr/lib/libGLEW.so -lglfw /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so
